profile_backing.source: bead description and Agent Mail start note

top_rows.name: linalg/matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64
top_rows.note: Broad-profile top, but direct GEMM remains blocked by the closed bit-exact ascending-k contract.

top_rows.name: linalg/cholesky_1024x1024_f64
top_rows.route: next shippable non-GEMM row if the lever preserves behavior

candidate.lever: safe std::simd lower Schur dot for blocked Cholesky
candidate.description: Replaced the scalar c=0..jb dot accumulation in cholesky_schur_update_lower_rows with eight-lane SIMD products followed by horizontal lane summation.

rebench.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=vmi1149989 RCH_WORKERS=vmi1149989 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=180 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-9dgqw-after cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/cholesky_1024x1024_f64' --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 2 --measurement-time 8 --noplot

proof_failure.reason: Candidate changed golden output bits by reassociating floating-point dot accumulation.
proof_failure.failed_obligation: golden-output sha256 and floating-point operation order must remain unchanged unless a separate behavior-contract bead admits tolerance.

isomorphism_proof.ordering: Candidate preserved p/q traversal and output addressing but did not preserve per-entry c contribution order.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: N/A: Cholesky has no pivot or comparison tie-breaking surface.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: Failed: eight-lane SIMD produced lane-local partial sums and a horizontal reduction, changing the scalar c=0..jb addition order.
isomorphism_proof.rng: N/A: Cholesky consumes no random state.
isomorphism_proof.errors: No public dtype, shape, or error surface changed in candidate state; final production source was restored.

alien_source.primitive_family: portable SIMD dense factorization dot product
alien_source.applied_slice: Measured a safe SIMD Schur dot after Cholesky remained the top shippable non-GEMM row.

next_primitive.target: reprofile restored source and attack a different FP-order-preserving linalg primitive or first land a behavior-contract bead
next_primitive.reason: The SIMD dot was performance-positive but violates the active bit-preservation contract. Do not repeat lower-Schur reassociation without an explicit tolerance contract.
next_primitive.target_ratio: >=2.0 score gate with same-worker RCH A/B and unchanged golden sha256
proof_obligations: floating-point operation order unchanged unless a separate behavior-contract bead admits tolerance
